name: Sonoma Mission Gardens
tagline: A full-service nursery and landscape company in the Valley of the Moon.
seoDescription: Sonoma Mission Gardens — full-service nursery and landscape design, installation, and consultation in Sonoma, CA.

hero.heading: Gardens grown in the Valley of the Moon.
hero.subheading: A full-service Sonoma nursery and landscape company — design, installation, and consultation, plus an extensive plant selection.

images.heroAlt: Sonoma Mission Gardens in Sonoma, CA

about.heading: About Sonoma Mission Gardens
body: Sonoma Mission Gardens is a full-service nursery and landscape company in the Valley of the Moon, pairing design, consultation, and project installation with an extensive nursery of rare herbs, succulents, trees, and garden décor.

services.title: Landscape design
services.description: Custom garden and landscape design for Sonoma Valley homes and properties.

services.title: Landscape installation
services.description: Full project installation, from planting plans to finished gardens.

services.title: Garden consultation
services.description: On-site guidance on plant selection, placement, and care from a knowledgeable staff.

services.title: Full-service nursery
services.description: An extensive nursery of rare herbs, succulents, trees, and garden décor in the Valley of the Moon.

items.a: You'll find us at 851 Craig Ave, Sonoma, CA 95476.
We proudly serve Sonoma, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at (707) 938-5775 — we're glad to help.

sections.heading: Get in touch with Sonoma Mission Gardens
sections.text: Call (707) 938-5775 or send a message — we'll get right back to you.
